title: ANALYSIS OF WORD FREQUENCY EFFECT ON NATIVE AND NON-NATIVE ENGLISH SPEAKERS
author: Svitlychna M.O.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Lexical decision task is a common technique for investigating word recognition. It is a procedure used in many psychology and psycholinguistics experiments. The basic procedure involves measuring how quickly people classify stimuli as words or nonwords.
steps_raw: Lexical decision task is a common technique for investigating word recognition. It is a procedure used in many psychology and psycholinguistics experiments. The basic procedure involves measuring how quickly people classify stimuli as words or nonwords.
